title: Build controlled real-project execution

limits.new_production_dependencies: allow only mature bounded filesystem or Git support that is not already available through the platform or Codex runtime
limits.architecture_changes: implement the documented Node workspace and execution managers without moving authority into UI, provider or storage adapters
limits.external_effects: local project filesystem and process effects allowed only through reviewed trust, claim, receipt and recovery boundaries; remote effects forbidden

stop_conditions: owner or detached R3 gate is unresolved at a package merge boundary
a path, project instruction or model output can expand its own authority
a partial file, command or Git effect lacks a deterministic recovery state
two writers can mutate one workspace without ownership
required test fails after two bounded repair attempts
